calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jun-04-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE
Kiatra J. Brice, Defendant appearing in Propria Persona
No other apppearance.
RULING:
Tentative ruling on Judgment Debtor's Claim Of Exemption is vacated. The court finds that the bank funds were direct deposits of wages - 25% shall be released to the creditor for payment on the judgment, 75% shall be released to the judgment debtor. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar May-28-2008 Continued To Jun-04-08 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 612
MINI MINUTES:

NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

RULING - Judgment Debtor's Claim Of Exemption is Continued to June 4, 2008 at 10:30 a.m. for hearing. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR.
